title: Ensure Open Curly Brace is at the End of a Line
description: This rule checks if an open curly brace is correctly placed at the end of a line of code. Proper brace placement enhances code readability and maintainability.
recommendation: Place the open curly brace at the end of the line.
impact: Improves code readability and consistency across the codebase, making it easier for teams to collaborate effectively.
